messages.author: Zeb Palmer (IdahoMesh)
messages.text: We have a new mesh in Southwest Idaho that covers all of the Boise Metro area / Treasure Valley -- It's very active and quickly expanding. If you're anywhere in/near Idaho, feel free to hop in our discord (invite here: https://idahomesh.org/discord/) . There are also MC meshes starting to form in East Idaho, we have plans to build a backbone to connect the entire Snake River Plain this spring (as soon as snow & mud cooperate). We'd love to have you join our mesh and help MeshCore expand in Idaho! (edited)

messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Zeb Palmer (IdahoMesh)
messages.text: I mean, we certainly want to connect North Idaho... but honestly given how much a pain north-south corridors are in this state (there's a reason we only have one N-S road) I think it's more likely that paths will establish through the Oregon and Washington Mesh long before we could have enough mesh hops up HWY 95 to connect us. but yes, we want to build a state-wide mesh.
